'''Sarken Rimk''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] who ran a dive instruction business out of his home on [[Whitesand Island]] on [[Dorumaa]]. He was an impatient teacher, and would irritably flip his ears when somebody grated on him. He would also mutter insults under his breath.<ref name="LFC">''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

Secretly, Sarken was slightly [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]]. He was capable of influencing customers enough that they were always sure that they learned a great deal from him, worthy of leaving a healthy tip.<ref name="LFC" />

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Broken Orbits: Depths of Dorumaa}} {{1st}}
